mapper.sql: id, request_no, customer_no, wallet_no, biz_type, amount, withdraw_type, account_type, account_name, account_number, bank_name, bank_branch, fee_amount, actual_amount, status, audit_user, audit_time, audit_remark, process_time, process_result, third_party_order_no, remark, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ds_withdraw_request ( request_no, customer_no, wallet_no, biz_type, amount, withdraw_type, account_type, account_name, account_number, bank_name, bank_branch, fee_amount, actual_amount, status, audit_user, audit_time, audit_remark, process_time, process_result, third_party_order_no, remark, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{requestNo}, #{customerNo}, #{walletNo}, #{bizType}, #{amount}, #{withdrawType}, #{accountType}, #{accountName}, #{accountNumber}, #{bankName}, #{bankBranch}, #{feeAmount}, #{actualAmount}, #{status}, #{auditUser}, #{auditTime}, #{auditRemark}, #{processTime}, #{processResult}, #{thirdPartyOrderNo}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE ds_withdraw_request SET account_name = #{accountName}, account_number = #{accountNumber}, bank_name = #{bankName}, bank_branch = #{bankBranch},
remark = #{remark},
update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE request_no = #{requestNo} AND status = 'PENDING'

UPDATE ds_withdraw_request SET status = #{status}, audit_user = #{auditUser}, audit_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
audit_remark = #{auditRemark},
update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE request_no = #{requestNo} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'MANUAL_REVIEW')

UPDATE ds_withdraw_request SET status = #{status},
process_result = #{processResult},
third_party_order_no = #{thirdPartyOrderNo},
process_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE request_no = #{requestNo}
AND status = 'APPROVED'
AND status = 'PROCESSING'
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ds_withdraw_request WHERE status IN ('PENDING', 'MANUAL_REVIEW') ORDER BY create_time ASC, id ASC
SELECT FROM ds_withdraw_request WHERE status = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY audit_time ASC, id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ds_withdraw_request WHERE customer_no = #{customerNo} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'MANUAL_REVIEW', 'APPROVED', 'PROCESSING')
mapper.update:
UPDATE ds_withdraw_request SET status = 'CANCELLED',
audit_remark = #{remark},
update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE request_no = #{requestNo} AND status IN ('PENDING', 'MANUAL_REVIEW', 'APPROVED')
